description: Join Binance as we celebrate Bitcoin Pizza Day 2025 with a livestream featuring insights from industry leaders and a community giveaway. Experience the journey of Bitcoin from its first transaction to its current status as a major asset.
topic_summary: Celebrating Bitcoin Pizza Day and its significance in crypto history, featuring messages from Binance CEO Richard Tang and Coin Bureau's Guy, along with community engagement and giveaways [t=5:84].
